creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
On a recent -CURRENT from 20th of December the WireGuard module can't be loaded on ARM64 / RPi4.

# kldload if_wg
kldload: can't load if_wg: No such file or directory

but the module is present:

$ ls -l /boot/kernel/if_wg.ko
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  - 279704 Dec 20 20:34 /boot/kernel/if_wg.ko

dmesg shows that blake2 can't be loaded and indeed it can't be found on arm64.

KLD if_wg.ko: depends on blake2 - not available or version mismatch
